data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic link generation at booking confirmation. While the linked use case describes the generation of a Zoom link upon booking, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is implemented in the system. Specifically, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the automatic generation of the link in the booking confirmation process, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of automatic link generation at booking confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
